overview.intro: OS_FOUNDATION IS THE INTERNAL OPERATING SYSTEM THAT POWERS ALL MONOLITH PROJECTS. IT PROVIDES A UNIFIED INTERFACE FOR RESOURCE ALLOCATION, TASK ORCHESTRATION, AND SYSTEM MONITORING.
overview.body: Designed as a composable kernel of UI primitives and service connectors, OS_FOUNDATION enforces consistency across every product surface. Components are version-locked and schema-validated, ensuring that upstream changes never silently break downstream consumers.
